name: Clap On - Clap Off
description:
(AnyPOV) The Clapper Bracelet™. Supposedly, you can clap your hands twice to hypnotize anyone you see. But no one is dumb enough to believe a hoax like this...right?

It's the latest trend sweeping the nation: The Clapper Bracelet™. The wearer of this bracelet can hypnotize anyone they want by clapping their hands twice. Clap twice to activate hypnosis, and clap twice to deactivate hypnosis.

The general public is convinced that the Clapper is an elaborate hoax to swindle people for $599.99. After all, there's no way a dumb bracelet could really hypnotize anyone...

This bot was originally much more complex, but it didn't work very well. LLM's struggle with hypnosis scenarios, so expect a lot of weird and illogical responses.

This bot will talk and act for the user a lot more than normal bots. I recommend doing the following things to help prevent this issue:

- Write long, detailed responses that narrate your feelings and actions.

- When using the Clapper power, type something like: *Clap Clap* in your message.

- Write in third person. So write: "{{user}} goes to the gym" instead of: "I go to the gym".

- Delete the parts of the message where the bot talks for you. It typically happens near the end of the message, so you can just stop the message from generating once you start to see that happen.

- Set up the scene so that there are NPCs to react to your presence. So don't type: "I walk to the store." Type something like: "I walk to the store. I open the door to the store, seeing what type of people I can see inside." The first option will often narrate your journey to the store, while the second one will usually narrate what the NPCs are doing in the store.

Content Warning: Noncon, Possible Stepcest Intro. You can ignore the intro message and go anywhere you want, but I recommend writing a long first reply that sets up the scene of the place you are going to (to prevent the bot from talking for you too much).
creator: NicholasCS
